caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: 4-digit 5412 roles include non-CPA siblings; actual CPA offices likely have more accountants and fewer clerks.
inputs.pi_dist: No reopened realization-rate series; split varies among attest, tax and CAS.
inputs.pi_moat: Source evidence is profession-wide, not a measured small-firm retention rate.
inputs.t50_years: Global survey scope and tool use are not equivalent to NAICS-effective adoption.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Not an observed owner-age statistic.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Leadership concern is not a formal universal succession-plan census.
inputs.active_consolidators: No reopened current consolidator census.
inputs.buy_mult: No reopened transaction-comparable series; owner compensation varies.
inputs.pricing_structure: No reopened small-firm fee survey.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $263,807 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541211); class <5: 35,096 firms, avg revenue/firm $300,013 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $46,952 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 9,158 firms, avg revenue/firm $944,405 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $147,799 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 4,257 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,000,227 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $313,036 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 2,015 firms, avg revenue/firm $6,602,856 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,033,347 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 271 firms, avg revenue/firm $37,129,554 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,810,775 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 88 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,137,349,114 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $177,995,136 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 2,286

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: Task-level estimate recognizes substantial drafting, reconciliation and administration automation while retaining licensed judgment and review.

l.detail: BLS Industry Productivity (IPS) direct: labor compensation (L02) $68,045.5M / sectoral output (T30) $134,726.2M, year 2022

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Mechanics and exact artifact bindings pass. All three registered sources were audited and support the core direction on rapid AI adoption, human verification, staffing pressure, and succession concerns. Consolidator, multiple, pricing, owner-age, and capture inputs remain explicitly bounded estimates rather than source-observed values; the 12 authored caveats preserve those limits, and no separate validator-authored caveat or score-changing material defect was found.
